title: Koinly Discount for EOFY
body:
Hi guys, is it just me, or does Koinly seem to be offering discounts far less frequently these days?
A couple of years ago there always seemed to be promo codes floating around from exchanges, affiliates, Black Friday sales, etc. This year I've hardly seen any decent offers posted.
Does anyone know if Koinly is still likely to run EOFY, tax season or Black Friday discounts this year? Or have they moved away from the regular 20 to 40% off promotions?
Keen to hear if anyone has found any working codes recently.
